attributes.title: [MongoDB OTel] Capacity
attributes.description: Connection utilization, memory usage, storage, and resource saturation signals.

This dashboard monitors MongoDB resource utilization:
- Connection counts (active, available, current) by database
- Connection utilization gauge (lower is better)
- Memory usage (resident, virtual)
- Storage, data, and index sizes by database
- Cursor and session counts
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "f0817869-feda-b90a-95b1-4f3f80152d46", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 12, "h": 4, "i": "f0817869-feda-b90a-95b1-4f3f80152d46"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Active Connections", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "84d295cd-c135-ac63-6f59-0f557c9f0176", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "4211ab02-7aa6-906d-c55c-d8cb3ab2550e", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default

"#cc5642", "stop": 1.0}], "continuity": "above", "maxSteps": 3}}}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.mongodb.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_per_server = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.connection.count)) WHERE attributes.type == "active",
       avail_per_server = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.connection.count)) WHERE attributes.type == "available"
  BY resource.attributes.server.address
| STATS active = SUM(active_per_server), avail = SUM(avail_per_server)
| EVAL util = CASE((active + avail) > 0, active / (active + avail), 0),
       gauge_min = 0.0, gauge_max = 1.0, gauge_goal = 0.7
| STATS ratio = MAX(util), gauge_min = MAX(gauge_min), gauge_max = MAX(gauge_max), gauge_goal = MAX(gauge_goal)

      BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
    | EVAL metric = "sessions"
  )
| STATS val = MAX(val) BY time_bucket, metric
| SORT time_bucket ASC
